summary_text: **Findings (highest severity first)** 1. **Critical: approved-file/hash-parity sync contract is bypassed in actual x-auto sync flow.** - Skill contract says thumbnail sync should go through approved-file flow with hash parity: [x-auto-thumbnail-art-director/SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/skills/x-auto-thumbnail-art-director/SKILL.md:107), [x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md:157). - Operational script directly copies + calls `sync_post_image.py`: [xauto_sync_missing_draft_thumbnails.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/xauto_sync_missing_draft_thumbnails.py:46), [xauto_sync_missing_draft_thumbnails.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/xauto_sync_missing_draft_thumbnails.py:50). - `xauto-sync-approved-thumbnail.py` exists but is not used by code paths (only referenced in docs/skills). - **Minimal fix:** route all x-auto thumbnail sync through [xauto-sync-approved-thumbnail.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-sync-approved-thumbnail.py:43), and extend it to also update queue metadata (`thumbnail_generator`, QA flags, bytes) atomically. 2. **High: “Manus-first” is declarative only; x-auto generation path does not implement it.** - Manus-first is declared in skill: [x-auto-thumbnail-art-director/SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/skills/x-auto-thumbnail-art-director/SKILL.md:3), [x-auto-thumbnail-art-director/SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/skills/x-auto-thumbnail-art-director/SKILL.md:53). - x-auto generators are direct PIL/OpenAI/Gemini scripts with no Manus path: [xauto_generate_missing_draft_thumbnails.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/xauto_generate_missing_draft_thumbnails.py:1), [xauto_regenerate_people_thumbnails_openai.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/xauto_regenerate_people_thumbnails_openai.py:13), [xauto_regenerate_people_thumbnails_nb2.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/xauto_regenerate_people_thumbnails_nb2.js:12). - Manus implementation exists only for note thumbnails, not x-auto: [note-thumbnail-gen.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js:198), [note-thumbnail-gen.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js:281). - **Minimal fix:** add `xauto-thumbnail-gen.js` (Manus-first + fallback), and make all x-auto thumbnail scripts call it instead of model-specific one-offs. 3. **High: policy contradiction between non-commercial contract and thumbnail skill’s default brand encouragement.** - Contract default: avoid names/brands unless explicitly requested: [x-auto-contract.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md:46). - Thumbnail skill currently encourages brand-presence scenarios in default trigger text: [x-auto-thumbnail-art-director/SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/skills/x-auto-thumbnail-art-director/SKILL.md:13), [x-auto-thumbnail-art-director/SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/skills/x-auto-thumbnail-art-director/SKILL.md:85). - **Minimal fix:** change skill language to “brand cues only on explicit user request,” otherwise force neutral/kawaii abstract direction. 4. **Medium: new x-auto compositor exists but is effectively orphaned, so variety policy is not enforced by execution.** - Compositor supports multiple families: [xauto-thumbnail-compose.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-thumbnail-compose.py:244). - No generator/sync script invokes it in the x-auto path. - **Minimal fix:** make `xauto-thumbnail-gen.js` always pass selected family into this compositor and persist selected family in manifest. 5. **Medium: CI checks validate wording, not behav...
